mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (name, category_id, price, image, description, status,create_time,update_time,create_user,update_user) values (#{name},#{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update setmeal name=#{name}, category_id=#{categoryId}, price=#{price}, image=#{image}, description=#{description}, status=#{status}
where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select sd.name,sd.copies,d.image,d.description from setmeal_dish sd left outer join dish d on sd.dish_id = d.id where sd.setmeal_id = #{id}
